questions.question: Question count: 2 Note: Best-effort structured extraction from a column-formatted source PDF. Where the source itself marked an answer as changed, that note is preserved.

Q1. (2024) What are the duties of the Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) as Head of the Department of Military Affairs? [2024] 1. Permanent Chairman of Chiefs of Staff Committee 2. Exercise military command over the three Service Chiefs 3. Principal Military Advisor to Defence Minister on all tri-service matters Select the correct answer using the code given below: Source ref: defence / Q5
Q2. (2024) Operations undertaken by the Army towards upliftment of the local population in remote areas to include addressing of their basic needs is called: [2024] Source ref: defence / Q6
